title: Product announcement email
response:
**Subject:** Your notes now work offline — no wifi, no worries

Hi there,

We know your best ideas don't wait for a good connection. That's why we're excited to introduce **Offline Mode** in Notely.

Now you can write, edit, and organize your notes anywhere — on a plane, in a tunnel, or off the grid entirely. The moment you're back online, everything syncs automatically. No manual saving, no lost thoughts, no "did that go through?" second-guessing.

Offline Mode works seamlessly across both mobile and desktop, so your notes stay with you no matter which device you reach for.

The best part? It's available today for *everyone* — including our free plan users. No upgrade required.

Just open Notely and start writing. Next time you lose signal, you'll barely notice.

**[Try Offline Mode now →]**

Happy note-taking,
The Notely Team
scoreDetail: completeness: 9/10, tone: 7/10, structure: 9/10, length compliance: 9/10 — All key points present and prominent with clear CTA and correct length, though phrases like 'excited to introduce' and bolded asterisks edge toward typical marketing-speak.
